record.comment: PP sec. 2705 repealed by Pub. L. 115-141, div. S, title V, sec. 502(5), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1131. Trigger available and applied, but did not display. New sec. 2705 as added by Pub. L. 115-141, div. S, title V, sec. 502(5), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1131. Trigger available and applied; does display.
Sec. 2705 as added by Pub. L. 115-141, div. S, title V, sec. 502(6), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1131. Correct trigger not available - sec 502(6); closest available applied.
As added Pub. L. 115-391 sec. 502(c)(2), 132 Stat. 5228.
